rationale: Russian strikes on Kyiv represent a qualitative escalation near Romania's Black Sea neighborhood, while the US-Iran deal driving oil prices down offers indirect economic relief. Score adjusted down: ongoing situation without qualitative change.

top_events.title: Russian strikes kill nine and set historic cathedral in Kyiv ablaze
top_events.summary: Confirmed deadly Russian strikes on Kyiv, including a historic cathedral, mark a qualitative escalation in the war near Romania's border and Black Sea region, raising regional security concerns.

top_events.title: Oil prices fall and shares jump after US-Iran deal announced
top_events.summary: The confirmed US-Iran peace deal is pushing oil prices down, offering potential relief on energy costs for Romanian households and the broader economy.

top_events.title: UK and Japan agree £18bn investment deal
top_events.summary: A large UK-Japan investment deal has minimal direct impact on Romania but signals continued Western economic momentum; negligible effect on daily Romanian life.
